author: y4rr
content: Decision: implemented ModelHandle<T> trait rather than hard-coding LlamaForCausalLM. Rationale: the acceptance-criterion tests need full control over token distributions (PeakedModel in the probe), which is impossible against a real neural network. The trait adds one layer of indirection but makes the algorithm provably correct under controlled inputs. LlamaHandle<'m, T> is the zero-cost adapter for production use.
